string 2:
The forest village seems such a nice place. I hear the most
beautiful singing there...
{next}It does sound nice.
{next}Who said that?
{next}Yikes! A talking sprout?!
Yes... I wish I could hear it from closer up...
Do you see the sprout just ahead of you? That is me!

We have spoken to one another before. Could it be that you
are a forgetful person?
I'm Sirenmon. Currently, I'm healing my body in this form.

I would love to talk with others more, but, sadly, not many
Digimon ever come here.

So I am often entranced by those voices from afar. What
about the village has changed?
{next}The band is back together.
{next}Can you describe these voices?
{next}I'm not telling.
I thought so! That is wonderful!

They sing, "glurp, glurp," so beautifully, I need but close
my eyes to hear them anew!

Oh, how cruel... Could you not show some sympathy for my
lonely heart?

That lovely chorus of Gekomon, with ShogunGekomon on lead
vocals...

I wish I could hear their enrapturing voices from right up
close...
{next}I'll bring the band here.
{next}Wanna go hear them together?
{next}I'll sing for you instead.

You will?! Oh, you have just made me happier than words can
say... Thank you!

As you can see, I am unable to leave the sanctuary. The band
would have to come to me.

I appreciate the offer, but... your kindness alone will
suffice. Thank you.

I am unable to leave the sanctuary. The band would have to
come to me.

I know it may never come to pass, but, even so, I have long
awaited the band's visit.
Glurp, glurp, glurp, glurp, gluuuuurp! ♪
...Huh, glurp? Can I help you with something, glurp?
{next}Sirenmon wants to hear you sing!
We need to talk.
Let me sing with you.
L-Lady Sirenmon, glurp?! S-Seriously, glurp?

I have nothing to say, glurp. Now, begone, glurp. Don't
interrupt my practice, glurp.

This is no place for amateurs, glurp. Only select voices may
sing here, glurp.
Did you need something else, glurp?

Although I'm of lordly station, can I truly sing
before one such as Lady Sirenmon, glurp?

...Perhaps I could make a passable showing, but are my
bandmates spirited enough, glurp?

If I could, I'd give each member Spirit Seeds, so nothing
went to chance, glurp!
{next}Understood.
{next}Spirit Seeds?
{next}They don't have enough spirit.

This is the show of a lifetime, glurp. They need Spirit
Seeds to be in top form, glurp!

As the name implies, they very helpfully bolster one's
spirit when chewed, glurp.

That's why I said we need Spirit Seeds, glurp! For glurp's
sake, listen!

In any event, we can't sing before Lady Sirenmon without
those seeds, glurp.
{next}Understood.
{next}Where can I find Spirit Seeds?
{next}How about getting them yourself?

Think of it as gathering the seeds not for me or the band,
but for Lady Sirenmon, glurp.

Let me see, glurp... I seem to recall it was somewhere
around here, glurp...

There are still Titans at large, glurp. A lord like myself
must avoid danger, glurp.

Anyway, the seeds are likely in this area, glurp! I'll send
you the coordinates, glurp.

Now then, I'll be rehearsing diligently until you return
with our precious bounty, glurp.

How about those Spirit Seeds, glurp? We can't sing for Lady
Sirenmon without them, glurp.

Yes, these are the ones, glurp! Thank you, glurp. Now, my
bandmates, chew away, glurp!
*munch, munch*
*munch, munch*
Glurp, yeah!
Glurp, yeah!

Sufficiently spirited, everyone, glurp? Now, to the
sanctuary, and please join us, glurp!
Gluuuuurp! ♪
Gluuuuurp! ♪
Glurp, glurp, glurp, glurp, gluuuuurp! ♪

Ah, what wonderful voices! My parched heart is as dewy with
emotion as a spring morning.

Oh, my... Look! The nourishment of song has blossomed new
growth within me!

I cannot give much by way of thanks... but please have this
ripe fruit of Karpos Hulē.
Thank you for the delightful music, everyone!

Should you have further need of the fruit of Karpos Hulē,
come pick more at your leisure.
